title: Crop Yield Loss Analyzer
description: Industrial-grade tool to quantify yield losses, identify hidden loss drivers, and suggest corrective actions based on ISO, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed genetics and local potential.

businessContext_i18n.en: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed genetics and local potential.

inputs.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Measured yield at harvest, used as baseline for loss calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured yield at harvest, used as baseline for loss calculation.

inputs.label: Harvest Loss (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of crop lost during harvesting operations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of crop lost during harvesting operations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

inputs.label: Post-Harvest Loss (%)
inputs.businessContext: Losses during handling, storage, and transport after harvest.

businessContext_i18n.en: Losses during handling, storage, and transport after harvest.

inputs.label: Field Condition
inputs.businessContext: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.

inputs.label: Irrigation Type
inputs.businessContext: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.

inputs.label: Pest Pressure (0-10)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).

inputs.label: Disease Index (0-10)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

inputs.label: Weed Cover (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of field area covered by weeds, competing for resources.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of field area covered by weeds, competing for resources.

inputs.label: Soil Quality Score (0-100)
inputs.businessContext: Aggregate soil health metric (organic matter, pH, structure, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Aggregate soil health metric (organic matter, pH, structure, etc.).

inputs.label: Labor Efficiency (0-100)
inputs.businessContext: Rating of labor productivity and skill level in field operations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rating of labor productivity and skill level in field operations.

inputs.label: Equipment Reliability (0-100)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of time equipment operates without breakdown during critical periods.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of time equipment operates without breakdown during critical periods.

rules.message: Actual yield cannot exceed expected yield. Please check input values.
Combined harvest and post-harvest loss exceeds 40%. Verify data or consider extreme conditions.
High pest and disease pressure simultaneously. Recommend integrated pest management review.

thresholds.alert: Critical yield loss detected (>30%). Immediate action required.
Harvest loss exceeds 10%. Check combine settings and operator training.
Soil quality score below 50. Consider soil amendment and conservation practices.
Equipment reliability below 60%. Schedule preventive maintenance before next season.

formulas.name: Gross Yield Loss
formulas.description: Difference between expected and actual yield.

formulas.name: Harvest Loss (kg/ha)
formulas.description: Absolute harvest loss based on actual yield.

formulas.name: Post-Harvest Loss (kg/ha)
formulas.description: Absolute post-harvest loss based on actual yield.

formulas.name: Field Condition Factor
formulas.description: Multiplier based on field condition rating (excellent=0.95, good=1.00, fair=1.10, poor=1.25).
formulas.formula: CASE field_condition WHEN 'excellent' THEN 0.95 WHEN 'good' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'fair' THEN 1.10 WHEN 'poor' THEN 1.25 END

formulas.name: Irrigation Efficiency Factor
formulas.description: Multiplier based on irrigation type (drip=0.90, sprinkler=1.00, flood=1.15, rainfed=1.20).
formulas.formula: CASE irrigation_type WHEN 'drip' THEN 0.90 WHEN 'sprinkler' THEN 1.00 WHEN 'flood' THEN 1.15 WHEN 'rainfed' THEN 1.20 END

formulas.name: Biotic Loss Index
formulas.description: Combined impact of pests, diseases, and weeds on yield.

formulas.name: Operational Efficiency Score
formulas.description: Composite of labor and equipment performance.

formulas.name: Total Yield Loss (%)
formulas.description: Primary result: overall yield loss percentage adjusted by field, irrigation, biotic, and operational factors.

primary.label: Total Yield Loss (%)
primary.description: Adjusted overall yield loss percentage incorporating all loss drivers.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Microclimate Variation
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unexplained yield variability due to local weather patterns not captured by inputs.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Nutrient Imbalance
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Suboptimal NPK ratios or micronutrient deficiencies not reflected in soil quality score.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Timing Delays
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Delays in planting, irrigation, or harvest that reduce yield potential.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Genetic Variability
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Inherent seed lot heterogeneity causing uneven maturity and loss.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Harvest Settings
suggestedActions.description: Adjust combine speed, reel index, and concave clearance to reduce shatter loss.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Integrated Pest Management
suggestedActions.description: Use biological controls, resistant varieties, and targeted spraying to reduce pest and disease pressure.

suggestedActions.label: Soil Health Improvement
suggestedActions.description: Apply organic matter, adjust pH, and use cover crops to boost soil quality score above 60.

suggestedActions.label: Irrigation System Audit
suggestedActions.description: Evaluate uniformity and scheduling; consider upgrading to drip or precision sprinkler.

suggestedActions.label: Operator Training
suggestedActions.description: Provide hands-on training for harvest and post-harvest handling to reduce losses.

suggestedActions.label: Preventive Maintenance Schedule
suggestedActions.description: Implement regular maintenance for all field equipment to improve reliability above 80%.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Yield Loss
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total yield loss adjusted by a confidence factor based on input completeness and consistency.
